title: High-Frequency Trading
subtitle: A Practical Guide to Algorithmic Strategies and Trading Systems
author: Irene Aldridge
authorBio: Irene Aldridge is a quantitative finance researcher and author specializing in high-frequency and algorithmic trading. She holds an MBA from INSEAD and a BSc in economics and mathematics from the University of London. She is the founder of Able Alpha Trading and has written extensively on HFT strategies, technology, and regulation.
notableQuotes: In high-frequency trading, every microsecond counts.
HFT is not about prediction — it is about reaction speed.
The technological infrastructure is the strategy.
Success in HFT depends more on technology than on financial theory.
